channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Panera Bread: FREE Sourdough Loaf — Today Only
item.guid: Panera Bread-FREE Sourdough Loaf — Today Only-2026-07-09
item.description: Walk in to any participating cafe today, July 9, and claim one free loaf of sourdough bread with no purchase required, first-come first-served (13 per store). (July 9, 2026 only)

item.title: Panera Bread: 40% Off Bowls & Salads — Big Value Week
item.guid: Panera Bread-40% Off Bowls & Salads — Big Value W-2026-07-09
item.description: Save roughly 40% on select bowls and salads at Panera through July 15 as part of DoorDash's Big Value Week promo. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: BOGO Entrée for $5 — Code BOGO5
item.guid: Panera Bread-BOGO Entrée for $5 — Code BOGO5-2026-07-09
item.description: Buy any whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, or soup and get a second for just $5 using promo code BOGO5 at online/app checkout. (Limited time)

item.title: Chipotle: Free Entrée with $25+ Order — Big Value Week
item.guid: Chipotle-Free Entrée with $25+ Order — Big Value -2026-07-09
item.description: Order $25 or more through the Chipotle app or website July 9–15 and receive a free entrée on your order. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: Jamba: 50% Off Any Smoothie In-App
item.description: Use the Jamba app to score 50% off any smoothie on your next order at participating locations nationwide. (Limited time)

item.title: Popeyes: $6 Big Box Meal
item.description: Get a 2-pc Signature Chicken or 3-pc Tenders with two regular sides and a biscuit for just $6 via online, in-app, or in-store order. (Through July 13, 2026)

item.title: Popeyes: 4-Pc Chicken + Side for $10
item.description: Order online or in the Popeyes app and get four pieces of Signature Chicken plus a regular side for $10. (Through July 12, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza Any Toppings for $9.99
item.description: Order any Domino's pizza with any crust and any toppings — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust at no extra charge — for just $9.99 each. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: Any Large Pizza Carryout — $9.99
item.description: Carry out any large pizza at Pizza Hut for $9.99, including the Big New Yorker — order online or in-app. (Limited time)

item.title: Arby's: Any Slider for $1.99
item.description: Grab any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations, available in-store and through the app. (Limited time)

item.title: Sonic: America $2.50 Menu
item.description: Order the Jr. Double Cheeseburger, All-American Hot Dog, medium Onion Rings, or Red White & Blue Slush Float all for just $2.50 each at Sonic. (Through July 12, 2026)

item.title: McDonald's: McValue Extra-Value Meals from $5
item.description: McDonald's McValue menu features meal deals starting at $5 for lunch and dinner with a rotating slate of app coupons available daily. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: $4 / $6 / $8 Biggie Deals
item.description: Wendy's Biggie Bag Deals start at $4 and come in three tiers — choose from sandwiches, nuggets, and fries bundled at set prices. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: The Taco Bell Luxe Cravings Box packs a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips, nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: KFC: 12-Piece Chicken Bucket for $15
item.description: Get a 12-piece KFC bucket of Original Recipe or Extra Crispy fried chicken for $15 at participating locations. (Limited time)

item.title: Dunkin': Eagle Cup: $10.99 with Free Bev + 30 Days of $3 Drinks
item.guid: Dunkin'-Eagle Cup: $10.99 with Free Bev + 30 Day-2026-07-09
item.description: Buy the limited-edition Eagle Cup for $10.99 and get a free medium beverage now plus a daily code for one $3 medium drink or refresher per day for 30 days. (While supplies last)

item.title: Subway: Moana Meal Deal — Upgrade for $1 More
item.guid: Subway-Moana Meal Deal — Upgrade for $1 More-2026-07-09
item.description: Upgrade any Subway combo meal for $1 more to receive one of five collectible Moana cups plus a $15 Fandango promo code for movie tickets. (Limited time)

item.title: Moe's Southwest Grill: BOGO Free Entrée
item.description: Get a buy-one-get-one free entrée at Moe's Southwest Grill through July 12 — bowls, burritos, and stacks all qualify. (Through July 12, 2026)
